input_text: The white animal lifted the stone. Agatha is in trouble. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. The city was destroyed. Mr Dursley is an American. The big mouse is strong. It is not probable that John is a child of Mike. Bears eat berries. Sparrows are birds. Tallinn is in Latvia with a probability 10 percent. The elephant was cool. Mary was heard to sing. The man standing by the door coughed. A village road was narrow. Riga is not in Estonia. The teacher showed the students the map. The window was broken. The picture was painted by Leo. Clinton defeated Dole. The guide offered the tourists tea. The dog chased by the boy escaped. Apparently, Tom left early. John is a child of Mike?
